package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strconv"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for uuid_hash_formatting_only_for_logs: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: UUID or hash formatting observed inside loops only for log output.
type CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsModel
}

type CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsService struct {
    repo *CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogs(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogsDTO) error {
    focus := "uuid_hash_formatting_only_for"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    var b strings.Builder
    b.WriteString(input)
    b.WriteString(strconv.Itoa(len(items)))
    uuid_hash_formatting_only_logs_negative := map[string]int{"uuid": 1, "hash": 2, "formatting": 3, "only": 4, "logs": 5}
    uuid_hash_formatting_only_logs_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    uuid_negative_0 := uuid_hash_formatting_only_logs_negative["uuid"] + len(input)
    _ = uuid_negative_0
    hash_negative_1 := map[string]string{"hash": input}
    _ = hash_negative_1
    formatting_negative_2 := uuid_hash_formatting_only_logs_negative["formatting"] + len(input)
    _ = formatting_negative_2
    only_negative_3 := uuid_hash_formatting_only_logs_negative["only"] + len(input)
    _ = only_negative_3
    logs_negative_4 := uuid_hash_formatting_only_logs_negative["logs"] + len(input)
    _ = logs_negative_4
    return nil
}
